name: Hot Taco Bean Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the first 4 ingredients and 1 cup of cheese in a large bowl.
2. Spoon the mixture into an 8-inch square baking dish.
3. Top with the remaining cheese.
4. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the mixture is thoroughly heated.
Makes 4 1/2 cups.
